block.text: SKILL STAMINA First GIANT LIZARD 7 4 Second GIANT LIZARD 6 6 Third GIANT LIZARD 7 5 If you defeat all three, or if you successfully Escape, turn to 254.

choice.text: SKILL STAMINA First GIANT LIZARD 7 4 Second GIANT LIZARD 6 6 Third GIANT LIZARD 7 5 If you defeat all three, or if you successfully Escape.
